MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Attorney ASHWIN V. LADVA of LADVA, SHOKER & ASSOCIATES 296-8844 moving to withdraw as counsel of record for the Plaintiff
Plaintiff NICOLE PEDROIA appearing by telephone in opposition

Argued and the Court granted counsel's motion to withdraw conditioned on his assisting Plaintiff to continue the May 3rd hearing on motion to dismiss. Should he fail to get this continued, counsel shall assist Plaintiff in opposing the motion. Order signed in open court. (301/PJB/Carol Karen, CSR #8189)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Nicole Pedroia To Attend Her Deposition
Off Calendar Feb-22-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant L.C. Interiors' Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Attend Her Deposition is granted. Late opposition has been considered. Plaintiff is ordered to appear at her deposition, to be noticed by Defendant, and to be completed no later than March 23, 2007. The court finds that Plaintiff's failure to appear for her deposition on two occasions was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $580, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

ORDER TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Dec-08-2006 Set To Order To Arbtitration Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Nicole Pedroia'S Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Nov-29-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant L.C. Interiors' Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $404.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
